ddls:
CREATE TABLE "books" (
  "book_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each book */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the book */,
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the genre of the book */,
  "publish_date" TEXT /* Date the book was published */,
  "isbn" TEXT /* ISBN number of the book */,
  "summary" TEXT /* Summary or brief description of the book */,
  "page_count" INTEGER /* Number of pages in the book */,
  "book_format" TEXT /* Format of the book (hardcover, paperback, ebook) */,
  "price" TEXT /* Price of the book */,
  "publisher" TEXT /* Publisher of the book */,
  "published_by" TEXT /* Published by (person or organization) */,
  "edition" TEXT /* Edition of the book */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the book (active, inactive, out_of_stock) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("book_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_books_genre_id FOREIGN KEY ("genre_id") REFERENCES genres ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "authors" (
  "author_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each author */,
  "full_name" TEXT /* Full name of the author */,
  "biography" TEXT /* Biography of the author */,
  "birth_date" TEXT /* Date of birth of the author */,
  "death_date" TEXT /* Date of death of the author (if applicable) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the author */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the author */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the author */,
  "awards" TEXT /* Awards received by the author */,
  "-Agent" TEXT /* Agent representing the author */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("author_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genres" (
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genre */,
  "genre_name" TEXT /* Name of the genre */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the genre */,
  "sub_genre" TEXT /* Sub-genre of the genre */,
  "parent_genre" INTEGER /* Parent genre of the genre */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "book_authors" (
  "book_author_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each book-author relationship */,
  "book_id" TEXT /* Reference to the book */,
  "author_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the author */,
  "author_role" TEXT /* Role of the author (e.g., primary, co-author) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("book_author_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_book_authors_author_id FOREIGN KEY ("author_id") REFERENCES authors ("author_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_book_authors_book_id FOREIGN KEY ("book_id") REFERENCES books ("book_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "book_genres" (
  "book_genre_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each book-genre relationship */,
  "book_id" TEXT /* Reference to the book */,
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the genre */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("book_genre_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_book_genres_genre_id FOREIGN KEY ("genre_id") REFERENCES genres ("genre_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_book_genres_book_id FOREIGN KEY ("book_id") REFERENCES books ("book_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "book_id" TEXT /* Reference to the book being reviewed */,
  "reviewer" TEXT /* Name of the reviewer */,
  "rating" TEXT /* Rating given by the reviewer (1-5 stars) */,
  "review" TEXT /* Review written by the reviewer */,
  "date_reviewed" TEXT /* Date the review was written */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_book_id FOREIGN KEY ("book_id") REFERENCES books ("book_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating */,
  "book_id" TEXT /* Reference to the book being rated */,
  "rating" TEXT /* Average rating given by all reviewers */,
  "num_ratings" INTEGER /* Number of ratings received by the book */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_book_id FOREIGN KEY ("book_id") REFERENCES books ("book_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales" (
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sale */,
  "book_id" TEXT /* Reference to the book being sold */,
  "date_sold" TEXT /* Date the book was sold */,
  "quantity_sold" INTEGER /* Number of copies sold */,
  "revenue" TEXT /* Revenue generated by the sale */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sale_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_book_id FOREIGN KEY ("book_id") REFERENCES books ("book_id")
)
column_names: Reference to the genre of the book
Summary or brief description of the book
Number of pages in the book
Format of the book (hardcover, paperback, ebook)
Status of the book (active, inactive, out_of_stock)
Date of birth of the author
Date of death of the author (if applicable)
Unique identifier for each book-author relationship
Role of the author (e.g., primary, co-author)
Unique identifier for each book-genre relationship
Reference to the book being reviewed
Rating given by the reviewer (1-5 stars)
Reference to the book being rated
Average rating given by all reviewers
Number of ratings received by the book
Reference to the book being sold
